title: Dungeon Recovery Company procedural space quality validation
operationalUse: Validate that the procedural recovery dungeon creates broad first-person exploration spaces, passable corridors, sufficient walls, reachable targets, and non-blocking primitive props.
userGoal: Prove the procedural dungeon has room-scale exploration quality instead of narrow corridor-only test geometry.
milestone: Procedural recovery job space quality gate

expectedDocuments.expected: Dungeon Recovery Company procedural recovery job requires broader first-person dungeon rooms, passable corridors, non-blocking props, and reachable targets.
Procedural Dungeon Space Quality expands the procedural recovery job from narrow test corridors into wider first-person exploration rooms.
Generator parameters define larger rooms, 3-cell corridors, tall walls, and primitive prop placement constraints.
Evidence records seed 1001, 2026, and 7777 room metrics, corridor metrics, wall height, prop validation, target reachability, visual/build status, and Public Release Ready=false.
Production State Graph includes Procedural Dungeon Space Quality feature, requirements, tasks, acceptance criteria, and evidence mapping.

validationChecks.expected: Generated procedural space quality scripts compile with zero compile errors.
Seeds 1001, 2026, and 7777 pass room, corridor, wall, prop, target clearance, reachability, and job completion assertions.
Space quality evidence is exported and linked to REQ-DRC-SPACE-* and AC-DRC-SPACE-*.

passCriteria: Unity Bridge health endpoint is reachable.
Procedural scene exists and can be opened.
Compile status passes after generated scripts are imported.
Every seed has minRoomWidth >= 7 and minRoomDepth >= 7.
Every seed has corridorWidth >= 3 and narrowPassageCount == 0.
Every seed has propCount > 0 and at least three prop types.
Every seed has propOverlapCount == 0, blockedDoorwayCount == 0, and blockedTargetCount == 0.
Every seed has reachableTargetCount == 3 and targetInteractionClearancePassed == true.
Every seed reaches Job Complete after deterministic recovery hook.
